heading: Effect of chapter on lawful United States Government activities
label: 6045 Effect of chapter on lawful United States Government activities
text: Nothing in this chapter prohibits any lawfully authorized investigative, protective, or intelligence activity of a law enforcement agency, or of an intelligence agency, of the United States.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Cuban Liberty and Democratic Solidarity (LIBERTAD) Act of 1996, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 104–114110 Stat. 785section 6021 of this titleMar. 12, 1996
